tracks.meaning: the outer boundary or layer of a physical object, body, or area of land
the outer layer of skin or tissue on a living body
to come into view or emerge, especially suddenly or briefly
to present or make something publicly known, typically information that was previously hidden
the graphical interface or layer of an application that users interact with directly
the outer boundary of a substance where chemical or physical reactions may occur
to bring a ship or vessel above the water level or cause it to rise
the uppermost layer of the earth's crust visible above ground or seabed
to scratch or damage the outer layer of something without affecting the interior
the visible outer area of the body or a localized region
a level or layer within a system of interconnected networks or infrastructure
a vessel or submarine that operates on or just below the water surface
